channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Biomarkers & Precision Medicine
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Biomarkers & Precision Medicine

item.title: Identification and validation of GNA15 as a novel diagnostic biomarker in ulcerative colitis.
The roles and heterogeneity of CD8+ T cells in inflammatory bowel disease: A narrative review of insights from single‑cell transcriptomics (Review).
item.description: International journal of molecular medicine - Review - The present review investigates the role and characteristics of CD8+ T cells in inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) using single‑cell transcriptomics, revealing their pivotal functions and remarkable ...

item.title: T cell and cytokine signatures as early predictors of response to IL-12/IL-23 inhibition in Crohn's disease.
item.description: Frontiers in immunology - Crohn's disease (CD) is a disabling inflammatory disorder with highly variable response to biologic therapies. Despite the availability of multiple biologic agents, a significant proportion of pati...
